title: Staged fixture-mode run orchestrator idempotency (mock)
problem: ticket-162 adds execute_staged_fixture_mode_run and CLI --staged-spine entry. Operators lack proof that re-running the orchestrator on the same DB does not duplicate rows.
acceptance_criteria: Unit test runs execute_staged_fixture_mode_run twice on one DB with patched network and asserts stable dual-spine counts.
No live LLM or live network in default pytest collection.
Golden tests remain mock-only and pass.
rollback_plan: Remove idempotency test; retain ticket-162 orchestrator.
